transcript:
CALLER: Hi. Do you have an online appointment booking system? Or is it only by calling?
AGENT: Great question! Yes, we have both options. You can book online via our website at sunriseclinic.in or through our mobile app. Calling is also always available.
CALLER: And can I choose my specific doctor online too?
AGENT: Yes, the online system lets you filter by department and select a specific doctor, then view their available slots in real time.
CALLER: What about cancellations online?
AGENT: You can cancel or reschedule through the app or website up to 2 hours before the appointment without any charges. For same-day cancellations within 2 hours, please call us.
CALLER: Perfect, very convenient. I'll use the app. Thanks.
